name: aicad-agent
description: Agent-native tools for deterministic, origin-anchored 2D CAD and transactional SolidWorks 3D modeling.

interface.shortDescription: Generate validated 2D CAD and transactional SolidWorks 3D parts.
interface.longDescription: Turns structured CAD intent into deterministic 2D geometry or feature-by-feature SolidWorks parts. Every 3D feature is origin-anchored, mathematically constrained, rebuilt, read back, audited, and rejected fail-closed if its geometry or topology does not match intent.
defaultPrompt: Use the plugin to draw a 120x80 mm plate with a centered 20 mm hole.
Compile this 2D CAD requirement into validated DXF and AutoCAD artifacts.
Validate my AICAD plan and explain any broken geometric relation.
Build this SolidWorks part one fully constrained and verified feature at a time.
